case_title: GEORGINA MCINERNEY VS. ERICA SHAFIR et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCINERNEY, GEORGINA AS TO DEFENDANT SHAFIR, ERICA DOES I TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCINERNEY, GEORGINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAFIR, ERICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 8 JORDAN AVENUE #7, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCINERNEY, GEORGINA SERVED NOV-21-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAFIR, ERICA

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SHAFIR, ERICA
